overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character riding a horse through a dense coniferous forest at night. The scene is illuminated by a lantern casting warm yellow light on the dirt path while stars are visible in the dark blue night sky.

agents.ego_description: character riding a horse at a steady trot through a dark forest path illuminated by a lantern

entered.detail: tall coniferous trees forming a dense dark wall on the left side of the trail
tall coniferous trees forming a dense dark wall on the right side of the trail
narrow dirt path winding through the forest with grass edges
dark blue night sky visible through tree canopy gaps with visible stars

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous ride through a dense pine forest at night. The dirt trail winds between dark walls of coniferous trees while a lantern illuminates the path ahead. The night sky with stars is partially visible through the canopy gaps.

events.description: river or creek becomes visible on the left side of the trail as the forest opens slightly

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride the horse along the trail as the environment opens to reveal water on the left

entered.detail: flowing water visible through the trees on the left side of the path
large boulders and rocky formations visible among the trees on the right

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through the forest but now runs parallel to a river visible on the left. The terrain becomes slightly more varied with rocky outcrops appearing on the right. The horse maintains a steady pace along the dirt path.

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt to more rocky gravel terrain

agents.ego_description: riding the horse through a rockier section of trail near the river, navigating around stones

entered.detail: large rocks and gravel patches immediately beside the trail
distant mountain terrain visible through the trees ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the horse riding through a more open rocky area near the river. The trail becomes gravelly with large rocks on the right side. The forest thins slightly revealing distant mountain slopes ahead, while the river continues to flow on the left at a greater distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ride through a dense coniferous forest at night that gradually opens into a rocky riverside landscape. It begins on a winding dirt trail enclosed by dark walls of pine trees, with a lantern casting warm light on the path beneath a starry sky. As the horse maintains a steady pace, the forest opens up to reveal a river flowing parallel to the trail on the left and rocky outcrops emerging on the right. The scene then shifts as the terrain becomes more gravelly and the forest thins, expanding the view to include distant mountain slopes. Finally, the camera moves through this open rocky area while the river continues to flow at a greater distance under the dark blue night sky.
